description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The exterior features a decorative motif, including a blue bird illustration and some printed text, adding a whimsical and personalized touch. The cup's rim is smooth and slightly thick, providing comfort for drinking. The interior is plain and unadorned, with a clean, glossy finish. The base is flat, allowing the cup to sit securely on flat surfaces. The overall design is functional yet charming, suitable for both home and urban café settings.
description: A white ceramic cup with a blue bird illustration, printed text, and a single handle, featuring a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and a blue bird illustration with printed text on the cup's surface.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible decoration or text.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing the plain white surface without visible artwork.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the printed text and part of the decorative motif, with the handle not visible.
